name: Cyberark Duplicate Group Names
description: Detects duplicate group names in cyberark, which can cause ambiguous access assignment.
query: SELECT LOWER(TRIM(g.display_name)) AS group_name, COUNT(*) AS group_count FROM cyberark_groups g WHERE COALESCE(TRIM(g.display_name), '') != '' GROUP BY LOWER(TRIM(g.display_name)) HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
remediation: Consolidate duplicate groups or rename to make ownership and access scope unambiguous.
